posts.title: Introducing SwarmAI: A Self-Improving Multi-Agent Orchestration Framework for Java
posts.author: IntelliSwarm Team
posts.summary: We built the first Java-native multi-agent framework that improves itself. 8 process types, RL-driven decisions, enterprise governance, and a 10% self-improvement loop — here's why we built it and how it works.

posts.title: Why We Built IntelliSwarm.ai — Engineering a Self-Improving Multi-Agent Framework
posts.author: IntelliSwarm Team
posts.summary: The story behind IntelliSwarm.ai — why we chose Java, how we designed 7 process types, and what makes a self-improving agent framework different from the rest.
